panels.description: Total number of FQDNs tracked per portal and source.
panels.title: FQDNs Total

panels.description: Active alerts per portal and alertmanager resource.
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Number of DNS groups per portal.
panels.title: DNS Groups

panels.description: Number of FQDNs synced from remote portals.
panels.title: Remote FQDNs Synced

panels.description: Total number of portals by type (local / remote).
panels.title: Portals

panels.description: Rate of controller reconciliations per second by controller and result.
panels.title: Reconciliations / sec

panels.description: Reconciliation latency percentiles by controller.
panels.title: Reconciliation Duration (p50 / p95 / p99)

panels.description: Per-handler reconciliation latency p95 for the selected controller. Useful to pinpoint which chain step dominates total reconcile time.
panels.title: Reconcile Duration by Handler — p95 ($controller)

panels.description: Average per-handler reconciliation duration for the selected controller. Highlights handlers whose mean cost dominates the chain.

targets.expr: sum(rate(sreportal_controller_reconcile_duration_seconds_sum{job=~"$job", controller="$controller", handler!=""}[$__rate_interval])) by (handler) / sum(rate(sreportal_controller_reconcile_duration_seconds_count{job=~"$job", controller="$controller", handler!=""}[$__rate_interval])) by (handler)

panels.title: Reconcile Duration by Handler — avg ($controller)

panels.description: Rate of HTTP requests per second by handler and status code.
panels.title: HTTP Requests / sec

panels.description: HTTP request latency percentiles by handler.
panels.title: HTTP Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)

panels.description: Current in-flight HTTP requests and active MCP sessions.
panels.title: HTTP In-Flight / MCP Sessions

panels.description: Rate of MCP tool calls per second by server and tool name.
panels.title: MCP Tool Calls / sec

panels.description: Number of endpoints collected per external-dns source type.
panels.title: Source Endpoints Collected

panels.description: Rate of errors across source collection, alertmanager fetches, and remote portal syncs.
panels.title: Errors / sec (Source + Alertmanager + Remote Sync)

panels.description: Controller-runtime workqueue depth per queue (controller).
panels.title: Workqueue Depth

panels.description: CPU time consumed by the sreportal process.
panels.title: CPU Usage

panels.description: Resident (RSS) and heap memory usage of the sreportal process.
panels.title: Memory Usage

panels.description: Go garbage collection pause duration quantiles.
panels.title: GC Duration (p50 / p95)

panels.description: Rate of requests from the controller-runtime REST client to the Kubernetes API.
panels.title: K8s REST Client Requests / sec

panels.description: Number of active goroutines in the sreportal process.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Open vs max file descriptors for the process.
panels.title: Open File Descriptors
